description: MCP server for Sonenta translation management: keys, translations, a11y, and source-health tools.
name: com.sonenta/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Sonenta API key (mcp:* scope). If omitted, the server reads it from ~/.sonenta/credentials (run `sonenta login`). Legacy SONENTA_TOKEN / VERBUMIA_API_KEY / VERBUMIA_TOKEN are also accepted.
environmentVariables.name: SONENTA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated project UUIDs to scope the server to. Optional; use SONENTA_PROJECT for a single project.
environmentVariables.name: SONENTA_PROJECTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional agent identity — a short run name that groups this session's work in the Sonenta dashboard.
environmentVariables.name: SONENTA_AGENT_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Optional agent identity — the agent kind (e.g. sonenta-i18n, sonenta-a11y).
environmentVariables.name: SONENTA_AGENT_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: Optional agent identity — the agent version. Defaults to the server's own version when unset.
environmentVariables.name: SONENTA_AGENT_VERSION
